zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Calthorpe於1411年10月出生在英國諾福爾可伯納姆 索普時，她的父親Sir John Calthorpe33歲，母親Amy de Wythe21歲。她於1430年10月16日與Sir Thomas Brewse在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1456年10月16日在英國諾福爾可享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可伍德布里奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Calthorpe于1411年10月出生在英国諾福爾可伯納姆 索普时，她的父亲Sir John Calthorpe33岁，母亲Amy de Wythe21岁。她于1430年10月16日与Sir Thomas Brewse在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1456年10月16日在英国諾福爾可享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可伍德布里奇。

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Calthorpe was born in October 1411, in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir John Calthorpe, was 33 and her mother, Amy de Wythe, was 21. She married Sir Thomas Brewse on 16 October 1430, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 16 October 1456, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Calthorpe est née en octobre 1411, à Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Calthorpe, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Amy de Wythe, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Brewse le 16 octobre 1430, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 octobre 1456, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Woodbridge, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Calthorpe im Oktober 1411 in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Calthorpe 33 und ihre Mutter Amy de Wythe 21. Sie hat am 16. Oktober 1430 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Brewse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Oktober 1456 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Norfolk, England und wurde in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Calthorpe è nata il nel ottobre 1411 nel Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir John Calthorpe, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Amy de Wythe, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Brewse il 16 ottobre 1430, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 ottobre 1456, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Calthorpeが1411年10月にイギリスノーフォルクブルンハム ソルペで生まれた時，父Sir John Calthorpeは33歳，母Amy de Wytheは21歳であった。1430年10月16日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでSir Thomas Brewseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1456年10月16日にイギリスノーフォルクで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクウッドブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Calthorpe(이)가 1411년 10월 영국 노르폴크 번함 소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Calthorpe(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amy de Wythe(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1430년 10월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Sir Thomas Brewse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1456년 10월 16일 영국 노르폴크에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 우드브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Calthorpe nasceu em outubro de 1411, em Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Calthorpe, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Amy de Wythe, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Brewse em 16 de outubro de 1430, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1456, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Calthorpe родилась октябрь 1411 г. в местности бурнам таурп, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Calthorpe было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Amy de Wythe, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Brewse 16 октября 1430 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 16 октября 1456 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности вудбридж, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Calthorpe nació en octubre de 1411, en Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Calthorpe, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Amy de Wythe, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Brewse el 16 de octubre de 1430, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1456, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
